title: IT Projektmanager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in Computer Science, Business Informatics or comparable
Experience leading and steering IT and software projects
PM methodology knowledge (Agile, Scrum, PRINCE2, PMI)
PM tool proficiency (Jira, Confluence, MS Project)
Understanding of software development, IT architectures and digital business processes
Strong communication and facilitation skills for teams and stakeholders
bonus_skills: Digitisation and business application project background
matched_skills: Agile/Scrum methodology — sprint planning, standups, retrospectives (Hapag-Lloyd)
JIRA and Confluence proficiency — directly matches required PM toolset
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination across product, engineering and business (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Project status reporting and documentation (HSBC burn-rate dashboards, sprint review reports)
Risk management and escalation (HSBC: risk escalation across 6 workstreams)
Workshop facilitation and presentation (HSBC hybrid town halls, ECE Group)
Business degree background with IT exposure
missing_skills: Computer Science or Business Informatics formal degree
Cloud project or digitisation platform experience
German C1+ for fluent daily communication
core_responsibilities: Lead and steer IT and software projects in digitisation, business applications and/or cloud
Responsible for project planning, execution and quality assurance from requirements to go-live
Collaborate closely with internal business units and external partners to develop tailored IT solutions
Analyse existing processes and derive optimisation measures for efficiency and automation
Ensure smooth integration of software solutions into existing IT systems
Facilitate workshops and presentations for stakeholders and project teams
recommended_emphasis: JIRA and Confluence daily use at Hapag-Lloyd — directly matches the required PM toolset
Hapag-Lloyd: Agile sprint coordination as central project coordination point between teams, product owners and stakeholders
HSBC: Programme governance, risk escalation and burn-rate reporting across 6 workstreams — evidences end-to-end PM breadth
HSBC: Hybrid event delivery and cross-functional coordination — demonstrates facilitation and stakeholder management skills
summary: Boru scores 56.3 (moderate match) with solid agile PM experience, JIRA/Confluence proficiency and cross-functional coordination capabilities that align with FERCHAU's placement role needs. The critical gaps are a formal IT/CS degree and direct IT project ownership experience; FERCHAU roles typically place candidates at client companies, so profile fit depends on the underlying client context. German B1 vs required very-good German is the most material practical barrier. Worth applying with emphasis on JIRA/Confluence tools, Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery and HSBC programme governance credentials.
